title: Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences Main Principles
content:
Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences Main Principles

As Üsküdar University academic units, we aim to promote a culture of quality and ensure continuous improvement in education and training, research and development, community engagement, and administrative processes. In this context, our fundamental principles are as follows:

1. Continuous Improvement and Development

We prioritize sustainable progress through systematic monitoring, evaluation, and improvement practices in quality processes.

2. Participatory and Transparent Governance

We adopt an open and accountable management approach by ensuring the active participation of all stakeholders in the process.

3. Ethical Values and Academic Integrity

We uphold ethical principles, fairness, and academic honesty in all academic and administrative activities.

4. Student-Centered Education Approach

We support a contemporary and interactive educational model that aims to enhance students’ knowledge, skills, and competencies.

5. Social Responsibility and Human Orientation

We consider contributing to society as a duty, with an approach that is sensitive to societal needs and respects human dignity and rights.

6. Data-Based Decision Making

We act on reliable data, objective analysis, and measurable criteria in all quality management processes.

7. National and International Compliance

We base our practices on the standards of the Higher Education Quality Council (YÖKAK) and international quality frameworks.
